name: Rending Snare
description:
Sharp metal jaws wind tightly into the pressure plate mechanism of this snare. When triggered, the jaws clamp shut and spin, damaging limbs in the process. The snare deals ] damage to the first creature to enter the square; that creature must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is until the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage plus ], and it becomes Clumsy 2 for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage plus ], and it becomes Clumsy 2 for 1 minute.
